mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_auth_group_menu_audit_h ( auth_group_cd, action_type, system_main_cd, system_sub_cd, before_menu_ids, after_menu_ids, affected_user_count, change_reason, request_id, request_ip, user_agent, created_by ) VALUES ( #{authGroupCd}, #{actionType}, #{systemMainCd}, #{systemSubCd}, CAST(#{beforeMenuIds} AS JSONB), CAST(#{afterMenuIds} AS JSONB), #{affectedUserCount}, #{changeReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.id , h.action_type , h.system_main_cd , h.system_sub_cd , COALESCE(h.before_menu_ids::text, '[]') AS before_menu_ids , COALESCE(h.after_menu_ids::text, '[]') AS after_menu_ids , h.affected_user_count , h.change_reason , h.request_id , h.request_ip , h.user_agent , to_char(h.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at , h.created_by FROM om_auth_group_menu_audit_h h WHERE h.auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd} ORDER BY h.created_at DESC, h.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
